title_zh: 波士顿儿童医院利用人工智能实现新诊断突破

summary_en: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
why_it_matters_zh: 运用OpenAI的人工智能技术，医院能够更精准和高效地识别罕见疾病，促进医疗创新与患者康复。
why_it_matters_en: By leveraging OpenAI's AI technology, the hospital can more precisely and efficiently identify rare diseases, advancing medical innovation and patient recovery.

title_zh: ITBench-AA：前沿模型在首个代理企业IT任务基准测试中得分不足50%
title_en: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks
summary_zh: 由Artificial Analysis和IBM发布的ITBench-AA基准测试显示，当前前沿模型在处理代理企业IT任务时，得分未超过50%，表明这些模型在实际企业IT应用中仍有较大提升空间。
summary_en: The ITBench-AA benchmark, released by Artificial Analysis and IBM, reveals that current frontier models score below 50% on agentic enterprise IT tasks, indicating significant room for improvement in real-world enterprise IT applications.
why_it_matters_zh: 该结果揭示了现有前沿模型在企业IT自动化任务上的局限，强调了开发更高效智能代理的重要性。
why_it_matters_en: This finding highlights the limitations of current frontier models in enterprise IT automation tasks and underscores the importance of developing more effective intelligent agents.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: AI模式如何改变美国人的搜索方式
title_en: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
summary_zh: 在推出一年后，AI模式的用户正在从关键词搜索转向使用自然语言查询。
summary_en: One year after launch, AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
why_it_matters_zh: 这种变化表明用户更倾向于用更自然、对话式的方式与搜索引擎互动，提高了搜索体验的效率和准确性。
why_it_matters_en: This shift shows that users prefer interacting with search engines in a more natural, conversational way, improving the efficiency and accuracy of their search experience.
